details: Searched all 4 toy op compute kernels (toy_binary_in_place, toy_reduce_partial, toy_tilize_untilize, toy_variance). ZERO DPRINT/TSLICE/TileSlice usage found in any compute kernel. Kernels use only cb_pop_front for intermediate CB release. Confirmed authoritative DPRINT forms and #ifdef guards (UCK_CHLKC_UNPACK/MATH/PACK, COMPILE_FOR_BRISC/NCRISC) in dprint.h, dprint_tile.h, device_print.h, and device_print.rst lines 120-178.
